positive: A central, highly detailed geometric fox mask illustration, stylized with bold linework and clean silhouettes. The fox mask is rendered in an Art Deco style, incorporating minimalist floral and tribal patterns, suitable for a graphic t-shirt print. The color palette should feature deep indigo blue, burnt orange, matte gold, and cream white, set against a neutral background for maximum contrast. The composition must be symmetrical, centered, and designed to look excellent when printed on fabric, emphasizing strong outlines and solid color blocking. Style: Graphic illustration, Art Nouveau/Deco fusion, Vector graphic quality. Lighting: Flat, studio lighting for crisp detail.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, amateur, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, logo, dirty, grunge, low contrast, jpeg artifacts, cropped, cartoon, sketchy, solid background
